intentSynonyms: upload a file to a channel in slack
description: Upload a file to a Slack channel

channel.description: Channel ID to share the file to (e.g., C01234567)

content.description: File content as a UTF-8 string (text files) or base64-encoded string (binary files). Max 20MB.

is_base64.description: Set to true when content is base64-encoded (e.g., binary files like images or PDFs). Defaults to false (UTF-8 text).

filename.description: Name of the file including extension (e.g., report.txt, image.png)

title.description: Title for the file displayed in Slack

initial_comment.description: Message text to include with the file upload

filetype.description: Slack file type identifier (e.g., txt, png, pdf) — auto-detected if omitted
